name: Cardholder Data Encrypted in Transit
description: Ensures cardholder data is encrypted during transmission using TLS 1.2+ (PCI DSS 4.1)
query: SELECT id, hostname, port, tls_version, service_type FROM tls_endpoints WHERE service_type = 'payment' AND tls_version < 'TLSv1.2'
remediation: Configure all payment endpoints to use TLS 1.2 or higher. Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1.
